stemHtml: The Performance-Limited Take-Off Mass (PLTOM) is defined as the...

options.a: maximum permissible mass of an aeroplane but excluding fuel.
options.b: maximum permissible total aeroplane mass at the start of the take-off run.
options.c: mass subject to the landing aerodrome limitations.
options.d: take-off mass subject to departure aerodrome limitations.
